Class ConfigDTO

java.lang.Object
lcr.beans.ConfigDTO
public class ConfigDTO extends Object
Data Transfer Object containing the hardware configuration parameters for the LCR meter. * @author sylkat

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ConfigDTO(Frequency frequency, Voltage voltage, Aperture aperture, PrimaryParameter primaryMeasurement, SecondaryParameter secondaryMeasurement, boolean autoRange, Range range, BiasVoltage bias, SeriesMode seriesMode)
    Constructs a full configuration instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • ConfigDTO

      public ConfigDTO(Frequency frequency, Voltage voltage, Aperture aperture, PrimaryParameter primaryMeasurement, SecondaryParameter secondaryMeasurement, boolean autoRange, Range range, BiasVoltage bias, SeriesMode seriesMode)
      Constructs a full configuration instance. * @param frequency the test frequency setting
      Parameters:
      voltage - the test signal voltage level
      aperture - the measurement integration time/speed
      primaryMeasurement - the primary parameter to measure (e.g., Cs, Cp)
      secondaryMeasurement - the secondary parameter to measure (e.g., D, Q, ESR)
      autoRange - true to enable automatic range selection
      range - the specific measurement impedance range
      bias - the DC bias voltage configuration
      seriesMode - the equivalent circuit mode (Series/Parallel)
